11	 * let model = await AutoModel.from_pretrained('Xenova/bert-base-uncased');

235	/**

237	 *
238	 * **Example:** Sentiment-analysis w/ `Xenova/distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english`.
239	 * ```javascript
240	 * const classifier = await pipeline('sentiment-analysis', 'Xenova/distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english');
241	 * const output = await classifier('I love transformers!');
242	 * // [{ label: 'POSITIVE', score: 0.999788761138916 }]
243	 * ```
244	 *
245	 * **Example:** Multilingual sentiment-analysis w/ `Xenova/bert-base-multilingual-uncased-sentiment` (and return top 5 classes).
246	 * ```javascript
247	 * const classifier = await pipeline('sentiment-analysis', 'Xenova/bert-base-multilingual-uncased-sentiment');
248	 * const output = await classifier('Le meilleur film de tous les temps.', { top_k: 5 });
249	 * // [
250	 * //   { label: '5 stars', score: 0.9610759615898132 },
251	 * //   { label: '4 stars', score: 0.03323351591825485 },

1975	export class ImageToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {
1976	
1977	    /**
1978	     * Create a new ImageToTextPipeline.
1979	     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
1980	     */
1981	    constructor(options) {
1982	        super(options);
1983	    }
1984	
1985	    /** @type {ImageToTextPipelineCallback} */
1986	    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {
1987	
1988	        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
1989	        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
1990	
1991	        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
1992	
1993	        const toReturn = [];
1994	        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
1995	            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
1996	            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
1997	            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
1998	                skip_special_tokens: true,
1999	            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
2000	            toReturn.push(decoded);
2001	        }
2002	
2003	        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
2004	    }
2005	}

2015	 *
2016	 * @callback ImageClassificationPipelineCallback Assign labels to the image(s) passed as inputs.
2017	 * @param {ImagePipelineInputs} images The input images(s) to be classified.

2019	 * @returns {Promise<ImageClassificationOutput|ImageClassificationOutput[]>} An array or object containing the predicted labels and scores.
2020	 *

2022	 */
2023	
2024	/**
2025	 * Image classification pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageClassification`.
2026	 * This pipeline predicts the class of an image.
2027	 *
2028	 * **Example:** Classify an image.
2029	 * ```javascript
2030	 * const classifier = await pipeline('image-classification', 'Xenova/vit-base-patch16-224');
2031	 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/tiger.jpg';
2032	 * const output = await classifier(url);
2033	 * // [
2034	 * //   { label: 'tiger, Panthera tigris', score: 0.632695734500885 },
2035	 * // ]
2036	 * ```
2037	 *
2038	 * **Example:** Classify an image and return top `n` classes.
2039	 * ```javascript
2040	 * const classifier = await pipeline('image-classification', 'Xenova/vit-base-patch16-224');
2041	 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/tiger.jpg';
2042	 * const output = await classifier(url, { top_k: 3 });
2043	 * // [

2389	export class ZeroShotImageClassificationPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ZeroShotImageClassificationPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {
2390	    /**
2391	     * Create a new ZeroShotImageClassificationPipeline.
2392	     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
2393	     */
2394	    constructor(options) {
2395	        super(options);
2396	    }
2397	
2398	    /** @type {ZeroShotImageClassificationPipelineCallback} */
2399	    async _call(images, candidate_labels, {
2400	        hypothesis_template = "This is a photo of {}"
2401	    } = {}) {
2402	
2403	        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
2404	        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
2405	
2406	        // Insert label into hypothesis template
2407	        const texts = candidate_labels.map(
2408	            x => hypothesis_template.replace('{}', x)
2409	        );
2410	
2411	        // Run tokenization
2412	        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(texts, {
2413	            padding: this.model.config.model_type === 'siglip' ? 'max_length' : true,
2414	            truncation: true,
2415	        });
2416	
2417	        // Run processor
2418	        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
2419	
2420	        // Run model with both text and pixel inputs
2421	        const output = await this.model({ ...text_inputs, pixel_values });
2422	
2423	        const function_to_apply =
2424	            this.model.config.model_type === 'siglip'
2425	                ? batch => batch.sigmoid().data
2426	                : batch => softmax(batch.data);
2427	
2428	        // Compare each image with each candidate label
2429	        const toReturn = [];
2430	        for (const batch of output.logits_per_image) {
2431	            // Compute softmax per image
2432	            const probs = function_to_apply(batch);
2433	
2434	            const result = [...probs].map((x, i) => ({
2435	                score: x,
2436	                label: candidate_labels[i]
2437	            }));
2438	            result.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score); // sort by score in descending order
2439	            toReturn.push(result);
2440	        }
2441	
2442	        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
2443	    }
2444	}

2744

2758

2764	            decoder_input_ids,

637	    modality_token_id,

641	    attention_mask,
642	}) {
643	    const token_positions = input_ids.tolist().map(ids =>
644	        ids.reduce((acc, x, idx) => {
645	            if (x == modality_token_id) acc.push(idx);
646	            return acc;
647	        }, [])
648	    );
649	    const n_tokens = token_positions.reduce((acc, x) => acc + x.length, 0);
650	    const n_features = modality_features.dims[0];
651	    if (n_tokens !== n_features) {
652	        throw new Error(`Number of tokens and features do not match: tokens: ${n_tokens}, features ${n_features}`);
653	    }
654	
655	    // Equivalent to performing a masked_scatter
656	    let img = 0;
657	    for (let i = 0; i < token_positions.length; ++i) {
658	        const tokens = token_positions[i];
659	        const embeds = inputs_embeds[i];
660	        for (let j = 0; j < tokens.length; ++j) {
661	            embeds[tokens[j]].data.set(modality_features[img++].data)

## Transformers.js Image-Text-to-Text Model Structure - Complete Analysis

### 1. **AutoModelForImageTextToText Definition**

**File Path:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775480726865-wm2oc1/src/models.js`

```javascript
    static MODEL_CLASS_MAPPINGS = [MODEL_FOR_IMAGE_TEXT_TO_TEXT_MAPPING_NAMES];
}
```

**Supported Models (Lines 8240-8252):**
The `MODEL_FOR_IMAGE_TEXT_TO_TEXT_MAPPING_NAMES` Map contains 11 vision-language models:
- `llava` → `LlavaForConditionalGeneration`
- `llava_onevision` → `LlavaOnevisionForConditionalGeneration`
- `moondream1` → `Moondream1ForConditionalGeneration`
- `florence2` → `Florence2ForConditionalGeneration`
- `qwen2-vl` → `Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration`
- `idefics3` → `Idefics3ForConditionalGeneration`
- `smolvlm` → `SmolVLMForConditionalGeneration`
- `paligemma` → `PaliGemmaForConditionalGeneration`
- `llava_qwen2` → `LlavaQwen2ForCausalLM`
- `gemma3n` → `Gemma3nForConditionalGeneration`
- `mistral3` → `Mistral3ForConditionalGeneration`

---

### 2. **Model Classes and Architecture**

#### **A. LLaVA Model Architecture**

**File Path:** `src/models.js` (Lines 3691-3716)

```
PreTrainedModel
```


**Key Method - _merge_input_ids_with_image_features:**
```javascript
_merge_input_ids_with_image_features(kwargs) {
    const vision_hidden_size = kwargs.image_features.dims.at(-1);
    const reshaped_image_hidden_states = kwargs.image_features.view(-1, vision_hidden_size);
    return default_merge_input_ids_with_image_features({
        image_token_id: this.config.image_token_index,
        ...kwargs,
        image_features: reshaped_image_hidden_states,
    })
}
```

#### **B. PaliGemma Model Architecture**

### 3. **Core Image-Text Processing Functions**

#### **A. default_merge_input_ids_with_image_features**

**File Path:** `src/models.js` (Lines 668-682)

```javascript
function default_merge_input_ids_with_image_features({
```

#### **B. default_merge_input_ids_with_features (Core Merging Logic)**

**File Path:** `src/models.js` (Lines 636-665)

**How it works:**
1. Identifies token positions in input_ids that match the modality_token_id (e.g., image token)
2. Validates that number of tokens matches number of features
3. Performs masked scatter: replaces image tokens with image feature embeddings
4. Returns updated inputs_embeds and attention_mask

```javascript
function default_merge_input_ids_with_features({
    modality_token_id,
    inputs_embeds,
    modality_features,
    input_ids,
    attention_mask,
}) {
    const token_positions = input_ids.tolist().map(ids =>
        ids.reduce((acc, x, idx) => {
            if (x == modality_token_id) acc.push(idx);
            return acc;
        }, [])
    );
    const n_tokens = token_positions.reduce((acc, x) => acc + x.length, 0);
    const n_features = modality_features.dims[0];
    if (n_tokens !== n_features) {
        throw new Error(`Number of tokens and features do not match: tokens: ${n_tokens}, features ${n_features}`);
    }

    // Masked scatter operation
    let img = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < token_positions.length; ++i) {
        const tokens = token_positions[i];
        const embeds = inputs_embeds[i];
        for (let j = 0; j < tokens.length; ++j) {
            embeds[tokens[j]].data.set(modality_features[img++].data)
        }
    }
    return { inputs_embeds, attention_mask }
}
```

#### **C. genericTextToTextForward (Abstract Forward Pass)**

**File Path:** `src/models.js` (Lines 718-796)

**Purpose:** Handles forward pass for image-text-to-text and audio-text-to-text models

**Key Parameters:**
- `encode_function`: Function to encode the modality (image/audio) values
- `merge_function`: Function to merge modality features with input embeddings
- `modality_input_name`: Key name for modality input (e.g., 'pixel_values')
- `modality_output_name`: Key name for output features (e.g., 'image_features')

**Flow:**
1. Extract text embeddings via `encode_text()`
2. If modality values present and not caching, encode modality features
3. Merge modality features with text embeddings
4. Handle special case for Qwen2VL's 3D rope position embeddings
5. Call decoder forward

### 7. **ImageToTextPipeline Implementation**

**File Path:** `src/pipelines.js` (Lines 1975-2005)

```javascript
export class ImageToTextPipeline extends Pipeline {
    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {
        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
        
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
        
        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
            const output = await this.model.generate({ 
                inputs: batch, 
                ...generate_kwargs 
            });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(output, {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }
        
        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

### 8. **Model Type Mapping**

**File Path:** `src/models.js` (Lines 126-141)

```javascript
const MODEL_TYPES = {
    EncoderOnly: 0,
    EncoderDecoder: 1,
    Seq2Seq: 2,
    Vision2Seq: 3,
    DecoderOnly: 4,
    MaskGeneration: 5,
    ImageTextToText: 6,          // ← Our focus
    Musicgen: 7,
    MultiModality: 8,
    Phi3V: 9,
    AudioTextToText: 10,
    AutoEncoder: 11,
    ImageAudioTextToText: 12,
    Supertonic: 13,
}
```

### 9. **Summary: Image-Text Input Processing Flow**

```
User Input (image + text)
    ↓
Processor._call()
    ├─ Image Processing (via AutoImageProcessor)
    │  └─ Returns: pixel_values [batch_size, channels, height, width]
    │
    └─ Text Processing (via AutoTokenizer)
       └─ Returns: input_ids, attention_mask
         
    ↓
Merge outputs: { pixel_values, input_ids, attention_mask, ... }
    ↓
Model.generate({ ...processor_outputs })
    ├─ _prepare_model_inputs() 
    │  └─ Extracts relevant parameters based on forward_params
    │
    ├─ encode_image() / encode_vision()
    │  └─ Returns image_features [batch_size, num_image_tokens, hidden_dim]
    │
    ├─ encode_text() 
    │  └─ Returns inputs_embeds [batch_size, seq_length, hidden_dim]
    │
    ├─ merge_image_features_with_text()
    │  └─ default_merge_input_ids_with_image_features()
    │     └─ Replaces image token placeholders with actual image embeddings
    │
    └─ Auto-regressive generation loop
       └─ Iteratively predicts next tokens until stopping criteria
```

|-----------|-----------|----------------------|
| Model Definitions | `src/models.js` | `AutoModelForImageTextToText`, `LlavaForConditionalGeneration`, `PaliGemmaForConditionalGeneration`, `Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration`, `Florence2ForConditionalGeneration` |
| Merging Logic | `src/models.js` | `default_merge_input_ids_with_image_features`, `default_merge_input_ids_with_features` |
| Generic Forward | `src/models.js` | `genericTextToTextForward` |
| PaliGemma Processor | `src/models/paligemma/processing_paligemma.js` | `PaliGemmaProcessor` |
| LLaVA Processor | `src/models/llava/processing_llava.js` | `LlavaProcessor` |
| Qwen2-VL Processor | `src/models/qwen2_vl/processing_qwen2_vl.js` | `Qwen2VLProcessor` |
| Generation Method | `src/models.js` | `PreTrainedModel.generate()` |
| Pipelines | `src/pipelines.js` | `ImageToTextPipeline` |
| Tests | `tests/models/{model_name}/` | Comprehensive test suites for each model |

```javascript
    static image_processor_class = AutoImageProcessor
    static uses_processor_config = true;
}
```

**_call Method Signature:**
```javascript
async _call(images, text = null, kwargs = {})
```

**Processing Flow:**
1. Process images to get pixel_values and image dimensions
2. Calculate number of image tokens: `floor(height/patch_size) * floor(width/patch_size) + num_additional_image_tokens`
3. Expand image_token placeholder in text based on calculated token count
4. Tokenize text with tokenizer
5. Returns merged dictionary: `{...image_inputs, ...text_inputs}`

**Configuration Used:**
- `image_token`: From processor config
- `patch_size`: From processor config
- `num_additional_image_tokens`: From processor config

#### **C. Qwen2VLProcessor**

**File Path:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775480726865-wm2oc1/src/models/qwen2_vl/processing_qwen2_vl.js`

**Class Definition:**
```javascript
export class Qwen2VLProcessor extends Processor {
    static image_processor_class = AutoImageProcessor
    static tokenizer_class = AutoTokenizer
}
```

**_call Method Signature:**
```javascript
async _call(text, images = null, ...args)
```

**Processing Flow:**
1. Handles conversation format with chat template
2. Processes images to get pixel_values and `image_grid_thw` (temporal, height, width)
3. Replaces `<|image_pad|>` tokens with `<|placeholder|>` based on image_grid_thw and merge_size
4. Tokenizes text
5. Returns merged dictionary with special image_grid_thw tensor

**Special Output:**
```javascript
{
    ...text_inputs,
    ...image_inputs,
    // image_grid_thw is critical for 3D position embeddings
}
```

### 5. **How generate() Method is Called**

#### **A. PreTrainedModel.generate() Signature**

#### **B. Generation Flow for Image-Text Models**

**Key Steps:**

1. **Validation & Configuration** (Lines 1745-1748):
   ```javascript
   this._validate_model_class();
   generation_config = this._prepare_generation_config(generation_config, kwargs);
   ```

2. **Prepare Model Inputs** (Lines 1751-1754):
   ```javascript
   let { inputs_tensor, model_inputs, model_input_name } = 
       this._prepare_model_inputs({
           inputs,
           model_kwargs: kwargs,
       });
   ```
   - Filters kwargs to only forward_params
   - For ImageTextToText models, kwargs includes: `pixel_values`, `input_ids`, `attention_mask`, etc.

3. **Handle Encoder/Decoder Preparation** (Lines 1761-1767):
   ```javascript
   if (!('encoder_outputs' in model_inputs)) {
       model_inputs = await this._prepare_encoder_decoder_kwargs_for_generation({
           inputs_tensor, 
           model_inputs, 
           model_input_name, 
           generation_config 
       })
   }
   ```

4. **Auto-Regressive Generation Loop** (Lines 1858-1900+):
   ```javascript
   while (true) {
       model_inputs = this.prepare_inputs_for_generation(
           all_input_ids, 
           model_inputs, 
           generation_config
       );
       outputs = await this.forward(model_inputs);
       
       // Process logits and sample next tokens
       const logits = outputs.logits.slice(null, -1, null);
       const next_tokens_scores = prepared_logits_processor(all_input_ids, logits);
       // Continue until stopping criteria met...
   }
   ```

#### **C. prepare_inputs_for_generation for ImageTextToText**

**File Path:** `src/models.js` (Lines 943-949)

```javascript
function multimodal_text_to_text_prepare_inputs_for_generation(self, ...args) {
    if (self.config.is_encoder_decoder) {
        return encoder_decoder_prepare_inputs_for_generation(self, ...args);
    } else {
        return decoder_prepare_inputs_for_generation(self, ...args);
    }
}
```

### 7. **ImageToTextPipeline Implementation**

**File Path:** `src/pipelines.js` (Lines 1975-2005)

```javascript
export class ImageToTextPipeline extends Pipeline {
    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {
        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
        
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
        
        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
            const output = await this.model.generate({ 
                inputs: batch, 
                ...generate_kwargs 
            });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(output, {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }
        
        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

### 9. **Summary: Image-Text Input Processing Flow**

```
User Input (image + text)
    ↓
Processor._call()
    ├─ Image Processing (via AutoImageProcessor)
    │  └─ Returns: pixel_values [batch_size, channels, height, width]
    │
    └─ Text Processing (via AutoTokenizer)
       └─ Returns: input_ids, attention_mask
         
    ↓
Merge outputs: { pixel_values, input_ids, attention_mask, ... }
    ↓
Model.generate({ ...processor_outputs })
    ├─ _prepare_model_inputs() 
    │  └─ Extracts relevant parameters based on forward_params
    │
    ├─ encode_image() / encode_vision()
    │  └─ Returns image_features [batch_size, num_image_tokens, hidden_dim]
    │
    ├─ encode_text() 
    │  └─ Returns inputs_embeds [batch_size, seq_length, hidden_dim]
    │
    ├─ merge_image_features_with_text()
    │  └─ default_merge_input_ids_with_image_features()
    │     └─ Replaces image token placeholders with actual image embeddings
    │
    └─ Auto-regressive generation loop
       └─ Iteratively predicts next tokens until stopping criteria
```

/**
 * The Pipeline class is the class from which all pipelines inherit.
 * Refer to this class for methods shared across different pipelines.
 */
export class Pipeline extends Callable {
    /**
     * Create a new Pipeline.
     * @param {Object} options An object containing the following properties:
     * @param {string} [options.task] The task of the pipeline. Useful for specifying subtasks.
     * @param {PreTrainedModel} [options.model] The model used by the pipeline.
     * @param {PreTrainedTokenizer} [options.tokenizer=null] The tokenizer used by the pipeline (if any).
     * @param {Processor} [options.processor=null] The processor used by the pipeline (if any).
     */
    constructor({ task, model, tokenizer = null, processor = null }) {
        super();
        this.task = task;
        this.model = model;
        this.tokenizer = tokenizer;
        this.processor = processor;
    }

    /** @type {DisposeType} */
    async dispose() {
        await this.model.dispose();
    }
}

/**
 * @typedef {Object} ModelTokenizerConstructorArgs
 * @property {string} task The task of the pipeline. Useful for specifying subtasks.
 * @property {PreTrainedModel} model The model used by the pipeline.
 * @property {PreTrainedTokenizer} tokenizer The tokenizer used by the pipeline.
 *
 * @typedef {ModelTokenizerConstructorArgs} TextPipelineConstructorArgs An object used to instantiate a text-based pipeline.
 */

/**
 * @typedef {Object} ModelProcessorConstructorArgs
 * @property {string} task The task of the pipeline. Useful for specifying subtasks.
 * @property {PreTrainedModel} model The model used by the pipeline.
 * @property {Processor} processor The processor used by the pipeline.
 *
 * @typedef {ModelProcessorConstructorArgs} AudioPipelineConstructorArgs An object used to instantiate an audio-based pipeline.
 * @typedef {ModelProcessorConstructorArgs} ImagePipelineConstructorArgs An object used to instantiate an image-based pipeline.
 */


/**
 * @typedef {Object} ModelTokenizerProcessorConstructorArgs
 * @property {string} task The task of the pipeline. Useful for specifying subtasks.
 * @property {PreTrainedModel} model The model used by the pipeline.
 * @property {PreTrainedTokenizer} tokenizer The tokenizer used by the pipeline.
 * @property {Processor} processor The processor used by the pipeline.
 *
 * @typedef {ModelTokenizerProcessorConstructorArgs} TextAudioPipelineConstructorArgs An object used to instantiate a text- and audio-based pipeline.
 * @typedef {ModelTokenizerProcessorConstructorArgs} TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs An object used to instantiate a text- and image-based pipeline.
 */

/**
 * @typedef {Object} TextClassificationSingle
 * @property {string} label The label predicted.
 * @property {number} score The corresponding probability.
 * @typedef {TextClassificationSingle[]} TextClassificationOutput
 *
 * @typedef {Object} TextClassificationPipelineOptions Parameters specific to text classification pipelines.
 * @property {number} [top_k=1] The number of top predictions to be returned.
 *
 * @callback TextClassificationPipelineCallback Classify the text(s) given as inputs.
 * @param {string|string[]} texts The input text(s) to be classified.
 * @param {TextClassificationPipelineOptions} [options] The options to use for text classification.
 * @returns {Promise<TextClassificationOutput|TextClassificationOutput[]>} An array or object containing the predicted labels and scores.
 *
 * @typedef {TextPipelineConstructorArgs & TextClassificationPipelineCallback & Disposable} TextClassificationPipelineType
 */

2031	 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/tiger.jpg';

2036	 * ```
2037	 *
2038	 * **Example:** Classify an image and return top `n` classes.
2039	 * ```javascript
2040	 * const classifier = await pipeline('image-classification', 'Xenova/vit-base-patch16-224');
2041	 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/tiger.jpg';

2718	/**
2719	 * Document Question Answering pipeline using any `AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering`.
2720	 * The inputs/outputs are similar to the (extractive) question answering pipeline; however,
2721	 * the pipeline takes an image (and optional OCR'd words/boxes) as input instead of text context.
2722	 *
2723	 * **Example:** Answer questions about a document with `Xenova/donut-base-finetuned-docvqa`.
2724	 * ```javascript
2725	 * const qa_pipeline = await pipeline('document-question-answering', 'Xenova/donut-base-finetuned-docvqa');
2726	 * const image = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/invoice.png';
2727	 * const question = 'What is the invoice number?';
2728	 * const output = await qa_pipeline(image, question);
2729	 * // [{ answer: 'us-001' }]
2730	 * ```
2731	 */
2732	export class DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {
2733	
2734	    /**
2735	     * Create a new DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline.
2736	     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
2737	     */
2738	    constructor(options) {
2739	        super(options);
2740	    }
2741	
2742	    /** @type {DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineCallback} */
2743	    async _call(image, question, generate_kwargs = {}) {
2744	
2745	        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1
2746	
2747	        // Preprocess image
2748	        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
2749	        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);
2750	
2751	        // Run tokenization
2752	        const task_prompt = `<s_docvqa><s_question>${question}</s_question><s_answer>`;
2753	        const decoder_input_ids = this.tokenizer(task_prompt, {
2754	            add_special_tokens: false,
2755	            padding: true,
2756	            truncation: true,
2757	        }).input_ids;
2758	
2759	        // Run model
2760	        const output = await this.model.generate({
2761	            inputs: pixel_values,
2762	            // @ts-expect-error TS2339
2763	            max_length: this.model.config.decoder.max_position_embeddings,
2764	            decoder_input_ids,
2765	            ...generate_kwargs,
2766	        });
2767	
2768	        // Decode output
2769	        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output))[0];
2770	
2771	        // Parse answer
2772	        const match = decoded.match(/<s_answer>(.*?)<\/s_answer>/);
2773	        let answer = null;
2774	        if (match && match.length >= 2) {
2775	            answer = match[1].trim();
2776	        }
2777	        return [{ answer }];
2778	    }
2779	}

3443	 * @returns {Promise<AllTasks[T]>} A Pipeline object for the specified task.
3444	 * @throws {Error} If an unsupported pipeline is requested.
3445	 */
3446	export async function pipeline(
3447	    task,
3448	    model = null,
3449	    {
3450	        progress_callback = null,
3451	        config = null,
3452	        cache_dir = null,
3453	        local_files_only = false,
3454	        revision = 'main',
3455	        device = null,
3456	        dtype = null,
3457	        subfolder = 'onnx',
3458	        use_external_data_format = null,
3459	        model_file_name = null,
3460	        session_options = {},
3461	    } = {}
3462	) {
3463	    // Helper method to construct pipeline
3464	
3465	    // Apply aliases
3466	    // @ts-ignore
3467	    task = TASK_ALIASES[task] ?? task;
3468	
3469	    // Get pipeline info
3470	    const pipelineInfo = SUPPORTED_TASKS[task.split('_', 1)[0]];
3471	    if (!pipelineInfo) {
3472	        throw Error(`Unsupported pipeline: ${task}. Must be one of [${Object.keys(SUPPORTED_TASKS)}]`)

1985	    /** @type {ImageToTextPipelineCallback} */
1986	    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {
1987	
1988	        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
1989	        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
1990	
1991	        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
1992	
1993	        const toReturn = [];
1994	        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
1995	            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
1996	            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
1997	            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
1998	                skip_special_tokens: true,
1999	            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
2000	            toReturn.push(decoded);
2001	        }
2002	
2003	        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
2004	    }
2005	}

## Analysis of `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775480726865-wm2oc1/src/pipelines.js`

### 1. First 100 Lines (Imports Section)

Lines 1-100 show the imports. Key components imported:

**Tokenizers:**
- `AutoTokenizer`, `PreTrainedTokenizer`

**Models (all use Auto* pattern):**
- `AutoModelForSequenceClassification`, `AutoModelForAudioClassification`, `AutoModelForTokenClassification`, `AutoModelForQuestionAnswering`, `AutoModelForMaskedLM`, `AutoModelForSeq2SeqLM`, `AutoModelForSpeechSeq2Seq`, `AutoModelForTextToWaveform`, `AutoModelForTextToSpectrogram`, `AutoModelForCTC`, `AutoModelForCausalLM`, `AutoModelForVision2Seq`, `AutoModelForImageClassification`, `AutoModelForImageSegmentation`, `AutoModelForSemanticSegmentation`, `AutoModelForUniversalSegmentation`, `AutoModelForObjectDetection`, `AutoModelForZeroShotObjectDetection`, `AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering`, `AutoModelForImageToImage`, `AutoModelForDepthEstimation`, `AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction`

**Processors:**
- `AutoProcessor`

**Utilities:** 
- `Callable`, `dispatchCallback`, `product`, `softmax`, `max`, `round`, `read_audio`, `RawAudio`, `Tensor`, `mean_pooling`, `interpolate_4d`, `quantize_embeddings`, `topk`, `RawImage`

### 2. ImageToTextPipeline Class Definition (Lines 1975-2005)

```javascript
export class ImageToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {
```

All four changes to `src/pipelines.js` are correct and the test file is in place. Here's a summary of everything that was done:

---

### Changes made

**`src/pipelines.js`** — 4 targeted additions:

1. **Line 44** — Added `AutoModelForImageTextToText` to the `import … from './models.js'` block.

2. **Lines 2008–2080** — Inserted after `ImageToTextPipeline`:
   - **`@typedef` JSDoc block** — `ImageTextToTextSingle`, `ImageTextToTextOutput`, `ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback` (accepts `images`, `texts`, `options`; returns `Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput|ImageTextToTextOutput[]>`), and `ImageTextToTextPipelineType` (composed from `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & callback & Disposable`).
   - **`ImageTextToTextPipeline` class** — Extends `Pipeline` with the same cast pattern as `ImageToTextPipeline`. The `_call(images, texts, generate_kwargs)` method:
     - Normalises single/batched inputs via `prepareImages`
     - Passes both image(s) and text(s) through `this.processor()` to get full model inputs (`input_ids`, `pixel_values`, etc.)
     - Computes per-item prompt character lengths by decoding `inputs.input_ids` (the same technique `TextGenerationPipeline` uses to strip echoed input)
     - Calls `this.model.generate()` and decodes with `this.tokenizer.batch_decode()`
     - Slices each decoded string to remove the echo, returns `[{ generated_text }]` per item

3. **Lines 3331–3340** — Added `"image-text-to-text"` entry to `SUPPORTED_TASKS` (after `"image-to-text"`) with `tokenizer`, `pipeline`, `model`, `processor`, `default`, and `type: "multimodal"`.

4. **Line 3513** — Added `"image-text-to-text"`: will return a `ImageTextToTextPipeline`.` bullet to the `pipeline()` JSDoc task list.

**`tests/pipelines/test_pipelines_image_text_to_text.js`** — New test file that:
- Checks the pipeline is an instance of `ImageTextToTextPipeline`
- Tests `batch_size=1`: single image + single prompt, verifies output shape (`[{ generated_text: string }]`)
- Tests `batch_size>1`: two images + two prompts, verifies `[[{ generated_text }], [{ generated_text }]]` shape
